versions.title: Circuit Box — your mission control
changes: 🎛️ New — Circuit Box: open the menu and tap Circuit Box to see everything Spinner is doing and control it all in one place — model, voice, language, dark mode, wallpaper, your agents, plan and live agent runs.
⚡ Every setting now has one home, with your live agent runs and token balance at a glance.

versions.title: Read any document
changes: 📄 New — DocIQ: tap the document button, snap a receipt, form, contract page or screenshot, and Spinner reads it, pulls out the key details, and answers your questions.
🔒 Private by design — document reading runs only on the secure premium models, never the free ones.

versions.title: Speaks your language — sooner
changes: 🌐 Spinner opens in your phone's language automatically — replies, translations and notes all come back in it.
🗣️ 24 languages to pick from in Settings, switch anytime.
⚡ Spoken replies start reading aloud after the first sentence — no waiting for the whole answer.
🔊 Smoother voice — each part is prepared while the previous one plays.

versions.title: Smoother, lighter, locked in place
changes: 📱 Rock-solid on phone — the screen is pinned in place and never slides or drifts.
☀️ Clean light look by default — switch to dark anytime with the top-right button.
⚡ Faster, private first load — fonts load straight from Spinner, nothing third-party.
✨ Polish throughout — clearer dark mode, consistent brand color, quieter notifications.

versions.title: Build anything, with the right model for the job
changes: 🛠️ Build it with Spinner — describe a website, funnel, tool, dashboard, or simple game and Spinner builds a real, working page you can preview and download.
🎯 The right model, recommended — when you build, Spinner suggests the best model for the job and explains why, so you are never guessing.
🧠 Switch models anywhere — a model picker on every fork shows what each one costs per turn; choose the brain that fits.
💬 Sharper companions — every guide now runs a purpose-built engine, grounded in what you share.

versions.title: Pick your model, and take your results with you
changes: 🧠 Choose your model — a new picker lets you pick the AI behind your chat and see how far your balance stretches on each one.
📄 Make a report — turn any conversation into a clean, printable keepsake you can save or share.
🎯 Sharper companions — every guide now runs a purpose-built brain, so answers are more expert and grounded in what you share.
⚡ Cleaner free tier — free conversations now run faster and in-house, no more cut-off replies.

versions.title: Welcome to Savannah, sharper answers, and stickers
changes: 🌳 Welcome to Savannah — a new fork that's your local guide to Savannah, Georgia: history, food, and getting around — with the real VISIT SAV stickers right there in the chat.
🎟️ Get the sticker — love a design you see in the conversation? Tap to grab the real one.
✨ Sharper premium answers — paid conversations now run on a stronger model for better, faster help.
🖼️ Cinematic fork designs — every fork has its own wallpaper, and you can change yours.
🔒 Hardened & faster — security and reliability fixes under the hood.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice, plus new tools to understand and protect your digital identity.

versions.title: Wallpapers, a real conversation, and a bigger free tier
changes: 🖼️ Real wallpapers behind every conversation — each fork now has its own cinematic backdrop, with a glassy iMessage-style chat floating over it.

💬 Spinner just talks now — ask anything and it answers naturally for that fork. The tools (Translate, Decode, Summarize and more) tuck into a tap-to-open menu — there when you want them, out of the way when you don't.
🛒 Easier Marketplace — add any free fork instantly, no email needed. Create a free account only when you want to save your conversations across sessions.
🎁 More free tokens — your free monthly allotment is now 1,000,000 tokens (subject to request limits on the free models).
✉️ Tell us anything — a new Report a bug · Request a fork button in the menu and the Marketplace.
🏠 A proper front door — Spinner opens to its home page; jump into the app whenever you're ready.
versions.next: Coming soon: change your chat wallpaper, pick your Spinner voice, and your own dashboard.

versions.title: Privacy, security & what's free
changes: ✨ A fresh, frosted look — and a new fork: Welcome to Savannah, your local guide to the city.
🔒 We don't track you. Your conversations are yours — we don't sell your data or build a profile on you.
🛡️ Stronger security across the app — we hardened how your data and Spinner itself are protected.
📜 Privacy & terms in plain sight — exactly how your data is handled, GDPR & CCPA included. Find them in the menu.
🎁 Most of Spinner is free — translate, decode, explain and your forks, at no charge. We give you everything we can for free.

💬 Two premium powers are paid, because they cost real compute to run: multi-speaker (telling who said what) and Managed Agents (Spinner doing real tasks for you). You'll always know before you use them.
versions.next: Coming soon: build your own forks to share, and pick your Spinner voice.

versions.title: The Glow Up
changes: 🛒 The Marketplace is open — a shelf of ready-made forks for real moments (traffic stops, doctor visits, lease signings, live translation and more). Browse, search and add the ones you want.
🪃 Your forks follow you — install or remove forks from the Marketplace and they sync to your account on every device.
🔗 Share a fork — send anyone a link and it opens in Spinner ready to use.
✨ A cleaner start — you begin with three essentials (Traffic Stop, Live Translate, Founder Mode); pick up the rest from the Marketplace anytime.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice — and build your own forks to share in the Marketplace.

versions.title: Cleaner home & clearer navigation
changes: 🚀 Spinner opens straight into your forks — no extra landing page in the way.
🏠 Tap the Spinner logo any time to come back to your home screen.
☰ A clear Menu button (top-right) for sign-in, your tokens and settings.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice — and build your own fork for any moment.

versions.title: Faster, sharper under the hood
changes: ⚡ Behind-the-scenes performance & reliability improvements across translate, decode and live voice.
🔒 Smoother, more secure checkout and support flows.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice — and build your own fork for any moment.

versions.title: Your token tracker
changes: 📊 See your tokens — your balance and allotment at a glance, and the full tracker anytime in the menu.
💡 Know what costs what — live voice and building a fork draw more tokens than text; now you can see the rates before you spend.
⚡ A sharper, more accurate usage meter.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice — and build your own fork for any moment.

versions.title: Smoother & safer live voice
changes: 🔒 Privacy hardening — your mic fully releases the moment a live session stops, every time.
⚡ Cleaner live connections — clearer messages if live voice can't start, and smoother stop-and-restart.
✨ Polish across settings and forks.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice — and build your own fork for any moment.

versions.title: Read-aloud free · live voice on tap
changes: 🔊 Read-aloud is free for everyone — tap Replay to hear any answer aloud, in your device's own voice and your language.
⚡ Smoother go-live — Spinner connects first and only asks for your mic when it's ready, so live voice starts clean (no dead-ends).
☕ Live voice starts with a coffee — one tap unlocks real-time speech; read-aloud always stays free.
versions.next: Coming soon: pick your Spinner voice — and build your own fork for any moment.

versions.title: Open it on the web
changes: 🔎 Need a live lookup? Spinner can now open results in a new tab — tap the ↗ button, or just ask, and it opens the web for you.
🔄 Smoother updates — when there's a new version, Spinner lets you know and refreshes to the latest in one tap.
⚡ Reliability fixes under the hood.
versions.next: More forks on the way — and soon you'll build your own for any moment.

versions.title: A sharper new look
changes: ✨ Refreshed Spinner branding — a bigger, cleaner logo and a brighter home screen.
⚡ Same realtime Spinner you know — just a little more polished.
versions.next: More forks on the way — and soon you'll build your own for any moment.

versions.title: New forks just landed
changes: 🍴 More forks to pick from — Language Learning, Founder Mode, Time Management, Clean Groceries, Speech Practice, Choose Your Major, Find Your College, Scholarship Finder.
✨ Don't see your moment? Build your own fork — describe it and Spinner sets it up.
⚡ Smoother fork switching.
versions.next: Keep talking — every fork runs on the same realtime Spinner, tuned for your moment. More on the way.

versions.title: Hear it again — voice replay
changes: 🔊 Replay any answer aloud — tap Replay on a response and Spinner reads it back in your device's own voice. Free, hands-free, in your language.
⚡ Smoother, faster real-time across every fork.
🧹 Cleaner upgrade flow and reliability fixes under the hood.
versions.next: More forks are on the way — and soon you'll build your own for any moment. Keep talking; Spinner keeps getting sharper.

versions.title: Spinner just leveled up
changes: ⚡ Faster, sharper real-time responses across all six lenses
🧠 Memory — Spinner now carries your context across sessions
🎙️ Smoother, more natural real-time voice
💳 Plans & token boosts are rolling out — start with a coffee, then Tier 1 / 2 / 3
🔒 Stronger security & privacy under the hood
versions.next: Keep creating — your free tokens refresh every month. When you want more, a quick "Buy Me a Coffee" unlocks the next level. We ship fast, so check back here each visit to see what's new.
